mentions.note: Caller bought at $63, sold at $83; now trading $72–77 range; Cramer likes it for next 1–2 years; reasonable growth and scale, market still has appetite for new supply.
Part of software rotation out; like DoorDash and Reddit, suffering as investors favor hardware only; capital flows negative despite solid business.
Definitely buy; strong growth away from data center; selling at 25x earnings; autonomous vehicle rollout positive; exactly what market wants.
